info.description:
REST API for Drop RFID. Public endpoints under /public use org-level API keys. Authenticated app endpoints, including routines, use Cognito JWTs and organization membership.

Public API rate limit: 60 requests/minute and 1000 requests/hour per API key. Standard X-RateLimit-* response headers are returned on public API responses.
info.title: Drop RFID API

post.summary: Generate a routine draft from a natural-language description
post.description: Uses AI to produce a validated CreateRoutineRequest and explanation. The routine is not persisted until the caller submits it to create or import.

post.summary: Generate a simulated scan session from a natural-language description
post.description: Uses AI to produce a session metadata object and a list of RFID entries based on the provided description. Useful for testing and demo data generation.

post.summary: Execute a GraphQL query or mutation against the public schema
post.description: Single GraphQL endpoint over sessions, RFID entries, SKUs, and orders, resolved for the organization tied to the API key. Useful for fetching a session's scanned tags already joined to their SKUs in one round-trip — e.g. `query($id: ID!) { session(id: $id) { rfids { epc sku { id skuCode productTitle } } } }` — for fulfillment reconciliation. Reads and the createSku/updateSku/createOrder mutations are supported.

200.description: GraphQL execution result. Field-level errors are returned in the errors array with a 200 status.

get.summary: List orders for the authenticated organization

post.summary: Create an order from SKU items

get.summary: Fetch an order with its items or RFIDs

status.description: pending | in_progress | review_required | blocked | completed | cancelled

get.summary: List routines for the authenticated organization
get.description: The organization is resolved from the API key.

post.description: Creates a routine in the organization resolved from the API key.
Parses and validates YAML or JSON routine manifest content, then upserts routines by code in the organization resolved from the API key. Idempotent — safe to re-run for bulk seeding.

get.summary: List scan sessions for the authenticated organization

200.description: Array of sessions with embedded device metadata.

get.summary: Fetch a single session with scanned RFID tags and device metadata

200.description: Session with embedded device and RFID entries.

get.summary: List SKUs for the authenticated organization

delete.summary: Delete a SKU and its RFID bindings

get.summary: Fetch a SKU with its bound RFIDs
get.description: Returns the full rfids[] array by default for backward compatibility. Provide rfids_limit and optional rfids_offset to return one RFID page with rfids_page metadata while rfid_count remains the total linked RFID count.

get.summary: List routines for the authenticated organization
get.description: Requires Cognito authentication and organization membership.

post.description: Requires Cognito authentication, organization membership, and admin access.
Parses and validates YAML or JSON routine manifest content, then upserts routines by code in the authenticated organization. Requires admin access.
Parses and validates YAML or JSON routine manifest content for the authenticated organization without writing changes. Requires admin access.

delete.description: Requires Cognito authentication, organization membership, and admin access.

get.description: Requires Cognito authentication and organization membership.

put.description: Requires Cognito authentication, organization membership, and admin access.

post.summary: Resolve a configured routine field value
post.description: Requires Cognito authentication and organization membership.

200.description: Resolved field value or validation result.

Forbidden.description: Organization membership or admin access is required.

description.description: Natural-language description of the routine to draft.
Natural-language description of the session to generate.

status.description: pending | in_progress | review_required | blocked | completed | cancelled

content.description: YAML or JSON manifest content. May contain a routine_bundle with routines[] or a single CreateRoutineRequest.

format.description: Optional parser hint: yaml, yml, or json.

UpdateRoutineRequest.description: All fields are optional. Only provided fields are updated.

UpdateSkuRequest.description: All fields are optional. Only provided fields are updated.

cognitoAuth.description: Cognito JWT for authenticated organization users.
